mapper.select: select id, name, address, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, service_time as serviceTime, sort, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from pickup_point order by sort asc, id asc

select id, name, address, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, service_time as serviceTime, sort, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from pickup_point where id = #{id}
select id from pickup_point where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into pickup_point(name, address, contact_name, contact_phone, service_time, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{name}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{serviceTime}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: update pickup_point set name = #{name}, address = #{address}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, service_time = #{serviceTime}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
update pickup_point set status = 0, update_user = #{actorId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 1
